text.title: Service Delivery SOP Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Service Delivery SOP Template end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: founder-walkthrough
step.action: Founder walks through one real delivery; recorder captures every action and decision.
step.decision-gate: If founder says 'it depends', flag for branch capture.

step.name: decompose-steps
step.action: Split into 5-15 named steps with single coherent action each.

step.name: extract-branches-and-gates
step.action: For each step, formalise decisions + author quality gates.

step.name: name-escalations-and-budgets
step.action: Per step: name escalation owner + time budget.
step.decision-gate: If any escalation is 'founder' for >50% of steps, redesign.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run validator. Publish to ops repo. Hand to first senior contractor.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix before handing off.
